attendee_form.send_email_to_attendee: Send an email to this attendee
attendee_form.no_email_disabled_title: This attendee has no email address on file
attendee_form.merge_attendee_description: Search for another attendee by their ticket token and merge their listing registrations into this attendee.
attendee_form.outstanding_balance_help: What the attendee still owes. Set to 0 when fully paid; the public payment link clears it automatically when they pay.
attendee_form.phone_pattern_title: Phone number (digits, spaces, hyphens, parentheses, optional leading +)
attendee_form.mixed_timings_warning: This attendee's existing daily listings have different start dates or durations. You can still add daily lines, but they won't inherit a shared default — pick the date explicitly for each new line.
